M1311 (M1309) Number Unstageble Pressure Ulcers D/T Coverage Slough and/or Eschar that were present at most recent SOC/ROC This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to coverage of wound bed by
slough and/or eschar that were present on admission (most recent SOC / ROC). CHAR 2 x x x
